hotels.description_en:
Elegant Accommodation: il Frangipane in Sigiriya offers a hotel with a garden, terrace, restaurant, and a year-round outdoor swimming pool. Free WiFi is available in public areas.
Comfortable Amenities: Guests enjoy private check-in and check-out, a 24-hour front desk, minimarket, grocery delivery, coffee shop, outdoor seating, family rooms, car hire, and a tour desk. Free on-site private parking is provided.
Dining Experience: The traditional restaurant serves Asian and international cuisines with dairy-free options. Breakfast includes continental and ГѓВ  la carte selections with juice, fresh pastries, pancakes, and fruits.
Prime Location: Sigiriya Rock is 1.9 km away, Sigiriya Museum 1.4 km, and Sigiriya Wildlife Range Office a 6-minute walk. The airport is 5 km from the hotel.
